description_long: This is a medium-sized, green plastic trash bin with a domed lid and a large rectangular opening at the front for depositing waste. The body is slightly tapered, wider at the top and narrowing towards the base, giving it a stable stance. The lid is integrated and curves smoothly, providing some protection from rain and odors, while the opening is large enough for easy disposal of typical urban waste. On the front, there is a clear pictogram showing a person throwing trash into a bin, indicating its intended use for general waste. The surface is mostly smooth with a matte finish, and there are no visible handles or wheels. This type of bin is commonly found in parks, sidewalks, and public spaces for convenient waste management.
description: A green plastic trash bin with a domed lid, front waste opening, and a pictogram for general waste. It has a smooth, matte surface and no visible handles or wheels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the domed lid and plain green face with no opening or signage visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the curved, domed lid and the depth of the bin, with no handles or wheels visible.
description_view_2: Main front view displays the large rectangular waste opening and a pictogram indicating general waste disposal.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the domed lid and smooth side surface.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: pictogram of person throwing trash into a bin on the front
